description: Plugin-distributed hooks for revops. Auto-merged with the consumer's session hooks on install. Paths use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} so they resolve to the install location.

hooks.comment: Advisory: flags mechanically-detectable RevOps anti-patterns (a pipeline stage with no exit criterion, a forecast doc with no named methodology, a hard-coded 3x coverage with no win-rate derivation, a lead-routing doc with no speed-to-lead SLA). Set REVOPS_STRICT=1 to make it blocking.
